raw_title: Visuality as an Affordance on Instagram News Production
title_en: Visuality as an Affordance on Instagram News Production
title_zh: 视觉性作为Instagram新闻生产中的可供性
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了视觉元素如何影响Instagram上的新闻制作过程。它关注新闻机构如何利用图片和视频等视觉内容来吸引观众，以及这些视觉工具如何改变新闻的呈现方式。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how visual elements influence news production on Instagram. It focuses on how news organizations use visual content like images and videos to engage audiences, and how these visual tools change the way news is presented.
research_direction_zh: 探索社交媒体平台中视觉元素对新闻制作和传播的影响，特别是在Instagram这样的视觉主导平台上。
research_direction_en: Exploring the impact of visual elements on news production and dissemination in social media platforms, particularly on visually-driven platforms like Instagram.
